name: runic-skills
description: 156 AI & Dev skills via MCP — code review, debug, tests, refactor, docs, LLM cost, security, agents and more. Works in VS Code Copilot Chat (@runic) and Cursor.
author: Diottodev

chatParticipants.name: runic
chatParticipants.description: 156 AI & Dev skills — code review, debug, tests, refactor, docs, agents, security and more.

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, and quality

commands.name: debug-error
commands.description: Diagnose errors and stack traces, find root cause

commands.name: generate-tests
commands.description: Generate unit tests (Arrange/Act/Assert)

commands.name: refactor
commands.description: Refactor code — Clean Code, SOLID, DRY

commands.name: explain-code
commands.description: Explain what code does (beginner → expert depth)

commands.name: git-commit
commands.description: Generate a Conventional Commit message

commands.name: write-docs
commands.description: Generate JSDoc, TSDoc, or inline comments

commands.name: prompt-engineering
commands.description: Design and improve LLM prompts

commands.name: llm-cost-optimizer
commands.description: Analyze and reduce LLM inference costs

commands.name: agent-designer
commands.description: Design AI agent architectures

commands.name: security-guidance
commands.description: Security review — OWASP Top 10 and beyond

commands.name: a11y-audit
commands.description: Accessibility audit — WCAG 2.2 Level A/AA

commands.name: prompt-injection
commands.description: Detect and harden against prompt injection

commands.name: benchmark-analyzer
commands.description: Interpret and compare AI model benchmarks

commands.name: model-eval
commands.description: Design custom LLM evaluation frameworks

commands.name: data-quality-auditor
commands.description: Audit data pipelines and datasets for quality

commands.name: agenthub
commands.description: Multi-agent collaboration with parallel subagents

commands.name: autoresearch-agent
commands.description: Autonomous experiment loop for optimization

commands.name: handoff
commands.description: Generate handoff documents for team transitions

commands.name: write-a-skill
commands.description: Scaffold a new Runic skill

commands.name: runic-list
commands.description: List all available Runic skills with descriptions

runic.autoConfigureMcp.description: Automatically configure Runic as an MCP server on activation.
